meta_desc: Engineering Manager, Tech Lead & Developer. Blending technical excellence with human-centric leadership.
hero_title: Translating ideas, elevating the team.
hero_desc: A developer at heart, I see code as the direct translation of our needs. Now an Engineering Manager, I am convinced that technical excellence comes from a smart mix of architectural pragmatism and caring management.
philo_quote: "Understand the why, craft the how. Engineering is more than just code."
philo_desc: As AI reshapes our industry, giving purpose to our actions has never been more vital. I have a deep appreciation for tech and clean code. I believe in taking the time to do things right and choosing the right methodologies. On the human side, I strive for humble, transparent leadership: working with heart, rejecting micromanagement, and empowering the team.
philo_stat3_sub: Dev, Scrum Master, Tech Lead, EM
exp_card1_desc: Humble and attentive manager. My mission is to create a trusting environment where the team can grow and deliver value autonomously.
exp_card2_desc: Strong Backend profile with a global understanding. I design technical solutions with a high standard for Code Quality and maintainability.
exp_card3_desc: Sound engineering starts with scoping. I align user needs with technical realities through a blend of hard and soft skills.
path_1_desc:
• Modernization & Architecture: Led the transition from legacy systems to a modern platform (Strangler Pattern).
  • Scaling Organization: Restructured ~30 contractors into autonomous Feature Teams.
  • Performance Culture: Tracking lead time using DORA metrics and Quality Engineering.
path_2_desc:
• Product Leadership: Led a Feature Team designing a global strategic BI application.
  • Dual EM / Tech Lead Role: Comprehensive management coupled with Java/Spring development and architecture.
path_3_desc:
• Product/Tech Alignment: Technical leadership of the BI platform, ensuring need/solution fit through Agile practices and the implementation of the "3 Amigos" (understanding, US refinement, and pre-design).
  • Quality & Performance: Major code refactoring that doubled calculation/display performance, and secured delivery with 80% test coverage.
  • Infrastructure & Ops: CI/CD pipeline optimization and orchestration of the migration from Rancher to Kubernetes (K8s) in close collaboration with Ops teams.
pub_1_desc: Multi-objective crypto portfolio optimization using genetic algorithms. Streamlit UI for monitoring.
pub_2_desc: What coming close to burnout taught me about true leadership. Learning to listen to yourself and protect your mental health.
pub_3_desc: How to bring quality back to the core of the product. Moving from a final validation step to a collective ownership.
pub_4_desc: Real speed comes from what you build right from day one. Learn to build sustainable products today.
edu_1_desc: Intensive project-based pedagogy (C/C++, Software Architecture). Fostering strong autonomy and complex problem-solving skills.
edu_2_desc: California State University San Marcos. Full immersion. Development of cross-cultural skills and a global perspective on engineering.
edu_3_desc: Acquisition of technical fundamentals and a structured approach to software development, networks, and telecommunications.
edu_4_desc: Professional Scrum Master I certification. Strong investment in human-centric leadership with training in Nonviolent Communication and behavioral analysis.
